item.title: Netherlands & Belgium 4 days
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling! 

Preparation Tips: Insurance, currency, visa info, SIM cards, and other  essentials to get you ready for the trip. 

Comprehensive 4-Day Itinerary: A tested plan to make the most of  your time exploring Belgium and Amsterdam.

item.title: Paris 4 days itinerary
item.description:
Prep Tips: Everything you need to know before you go—insurance,  currency, visas, SIM cards, and more.

Our Insights: Learn from our firsthand experiences, with tips we wish  we had known!

Detailed 4-Day Plan: Make the most of your time with a day-by-day  itinerary covering all the must-see sights. 

Activity Booking Links: Save time with direct links to book top  attractions.

item.title: Switzerland 7 Day Itinerary
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling!  

Preparation Tips: The best time to visit, travel insurance advice,  currency and visa guidance, SIM card options, and how to make the  most of your Swiss Pass.  

Detailed 7-Day Itinerary: A day-by-day plan with alternatives to match  your preferences and pace.  Attraction

Booking Links: Save time with curated links to the places  we loved most.

title: “Northern Lights Private tour” description: “Discover Northern Lights in Finland with other amazing experiences and unique Arctic moments.” price: 4600 buy_link: “https://your-gumroad-checkout-link.com/northern-lights" image: “/images/northern-lights.jpg” duration: “7 days” location: “Finland, Lapland”

Your Arctic Adventure Awaits

Experience the magic of the Northern Lights in Finnish Lapland. This private tour offers:

  • Accommodation: 6 nights in premium glass igloos and wilderness hotels
  • Activities:
    • Northern Lights hunting by snowmobile
    • Reindeer safari
    • Husky sledding experience
    • Visit to Santa Claus Village
  • Meals: Daily breakfast and 3 traditional Lappish dinners
  • Transportation: Private transfers throughout the tour

Tour Highlights

  • Witness the Aurora Borealis from the comfort of your glass igloo
  • Drive your own snowmobile through arctic wilderness
  • Meet friendly reindeer and learn about Sami culture
  • Experience the thrill of husky sledding
  • Cross the Arctic Circle and receive a certificate

Included

  • Professional English-speaking guide
  • All activities and equipment
  • Thermal overalls and winter boots
  • Hotel taxes and service fees

Not Included

  • International flights
  • Travel insurance
  • Personal expenses
  • Meals not specified in itinerary

Best Time to Visit

September to March for the best Northern Lights viewing opportunities.

item.title: Iceland Northern Lights Tour
item.description:
Witness magical Northern Lights and explore glaciers and volcanoes.

Highlights:

  • Aurora hunting
  • Ice cave tour
  • Golden Circle
  • Blue Lagoon spa

item.title: Japan Cherry Blossom Tour
item.description:
Experience the beauty of Sakura season in Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka.
Visit ancient temples, modern cities, and traditional villages.

Highlights:

  • Tokyo city tour
  • Mt. Fuji day trip
  • Kyoto temples
  • Bullet train experience

item.title: Ready To Go Products
item.description: All our digital products are available for instant download.

item.title: Tanzania Safari Group Tour
item.description: This is a guided group safari covering Tanzania’s top wildlife parks with experienced local guides.

item.title: Tanzania Safari Group Tour
item.description: Fixed-Date Group Tour This tour runs on ﬁxed dates with a pre-deﬁned itinerary and is ideal for travelers who prefer a well-planned group safari experience. The tour is operated by our trusted local partner in Tanzania. While we may not be physically present on this trip, the itinerary, quality standards, and coordination are carefully curated and overseen by us to ensure a smooth and reliable experience.  Why Choose This Tanzania Safari • Guided safari in a 4x4 Land Cruiser with an experienced local driver- guide • Multiple days in Serengeti for relaxed and unhurried wildlife viewing • Strategic use of Ngorongoro Crater without overnight conservation fees • Mid-range lodges and tented camps chosen for comfort and location • Cultural interaction with Maasai communities • Routes and pacing planned based on real on-ground travel experience Day by Day Itinerary (Overview) Day 1 | Arrival in Arusha Arrive at Kilimanjaro International Airport or Arusha. Transfer to your hotel and rest. Day 2 | Arusha to Ngorongoro Crater Drive to Ngorongoro Conservation Area. Descend into the crater for a game drive with excellent chances of Big Five sightings. Exit before sunset and overnight in Karatu. For Internal Use Only Day 3 | Karatu to Serengeti Transit through Ngorongoro Conservation Area and enter Serengeti by midday. Game drive en route to your camp in Central Serengeti. Day 4 | Serengeti Full Day Morning and afternoon game drives with a midday rest. Explore the vast Serengeti ecosystem. Day 5 | Serengeti Full Day Another full day of safari with extended wildlife viewing opportunities. Day 6 | Serengeti to Arusha Early exit from Serengeti with an optional short sunrise drive. Scenic drive back to Arusha. Day 7 | Maasai Village and Serval Wildlife Sanctuary Morning visit to a Maasai village followed by Serval Wildlife Sanctuary. Transfer to the airport for onward ﬂight.  Pricing  Price Includes • Experienced and fully qualiﬁed safari driver-guide • 4x4 Land Cruiser customized for safari use • Accommodation as per itinerary • All national park and conservation fees • Meals as mentioned in the itinerary • Drinking water during game drives • Guided Maasai village visit • Game drives in Serengeti and Ngorongoro Crater  Price Excludes • International ﬂights • Domestic ﬂights unless speciﬁed • Hot air balloon safari • Beverages other than drinking water • Tips and gratuities • Personal expenses • Travel and medical insurance  Booking and Payment Policy For Internal Use Only • A deposit is required to conﬁrm the booking • Full payment must be completed 60 days before departure • Lodges and services are conﬁrmed only after payment is received • Payment implies acceptance of all booking terms and conditions ♺ Cancellation Policy • 48 days or more before departure: 20 percent cancellation fee • 15 to 47 days before departure: 50 percent cancellation fee • Within 14 days of departure: 100 percent cancellation fee • No refunds once the safari has commenced  Important Notes • Travel and medical insurance is mandatory • Safari activities take place in remote wilderness areas • Wildlife sightings cannot be guaranteed • Itinerary order may change due to weather or operational reasons  Payment Method • Bank transfer only • Any bank charges must be borne by the traveler  Why Travel With Us We are Mahulima and Kaustuv, travelers who have explored 89 countries across 6 continents. We believe great journeys are built on real experience, not brochures. Our Approach • We travel ﬁrst and curate later • Every route and stay is inspired by what works on the ground • No rushed schedules or unrealistic promises This Trip Is Ideal For • Couples and solo travelers • Small groups • First-time safari travelers • Content creators and storytellers • Travelers seeking meaningful experiences For Internal Use Only Our Promise We curate trips the same way we plan our own journeys with care, honesty, and real-world experience. FAQ – Fixed-Date Group Tour (Tanzania) Will you be traveling with the group? No. The tour is operated by our trusted local partner. The planning and quality control are handled by us. Who manages the tour on the ground? An experienced local tour operator in Tanzania manages guides, vehicles, accommodation, and logistics. Will there be a guide throughout the trip? Yes. Professional local driver-guides accompany the group during the safari. Is this a group or private tour? This is a ﬁxed-date group tour with a ﬁxed itinerary. Can the itinerary be customized? Customization is limited. Private tours can be arranged separately.

item.title: Thailand Beach & Culture Tour
item.description:
Explore Bangkok, Phuket, and Krabi with beautiful beaches and nightlife.

Highlights:

  • Island hopping
  • Phi Phi Islands
  • Floating markets
  • Temple visits

item.title: Traveling from 10 to 15 Days
item.description: What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:  A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).  Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.  A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.  Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.  Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable.

item.title: Traveling upto 10 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable

item.title: Traveling upto 6 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and morememorable.
